Brief Hospital Course:

prox humerous fx and exploration of radial nerve and neuroplasty
was transfered to the pacu stable because of the concern of etoh
withdrawal  he was transfered to the micu for closer post op
monitering he did well with out any major problems  and was dcd
home to be followed up by dr Chen in 2 weeks post op
